examples: Youmight try playing games from the CDROM.
A wide variety of packages and ports are on the CDROM as well as the web site.
The mostrecent versions of FreeBSD let you mount the CDROM with just /sbin/mount /cdrom.
Separate PDF files of every module are also provided both on the web site and on the CDROM.
The CDROM contains the entire website, complete with over 500 Internet links that can be accessed directly from the CDROM (via an Internet connection).
